commands.review_summary:
This PR adds a fast path in the embedded agent subscriber so ordinary plain text deltas reuse incremental visible text while final, phase-aware, silent, media, audio, and reply-directive paths still use full parsing, with regression tests for directive-tail handling.

PR surface: Source +36, Tests +65. Total +101 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live runtime reproduction was established in this read-only review. Source inspection does show current main reparses accumulated stream text for handled updates, and the PR adds focused regressions for the intended fast-path boundaries.
commands.review_followup: - Maintainers should decide whether to require the scoped benchmark evidence before undrafting or landing this message-streaming hot-path PR.

target.title: fix(agents): avoid full stream replay on text deltas
target.body:
## Summary
- avoid reparsing the full accumulated assistant stream for ordinary plain text deltas in the embedded subscriber
- keep full reply-directive parsing for `text_end`, phase-aware replies, silent tokens, media/reply/audio directives, and streams whose prior raw text was already cleaned
- add regressions for held directive tails and stripped directive metadata staying out of later deltas

Relates to https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/86599.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.messages.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.subscribe-embedded-agent-session.emits-block-replies-text-end-does-not.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.subscribe-embedded-agent-session.suppresses-commentary-phase-output.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.subscribe-embedded-agent-session.subscribeembeddedagentsession.test.ts --reporter=dot` - 4 files / 96 tests passed
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD` - passed
- AWS Crabbox: `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --idle-timeout 60m --ttl 120m --timing-json --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"`; provider=aws, lease=cbx_0d9f48a65c2f, run=run_e8bb03a9f232, exit=0, leaseStopped=true
- Autoreview: `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` - clean, no actionable findings

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Plain assistant text deltas no longer force full accumulated reply-directive parsing on every chunk while directive-bearing, final, and phase-aware paths keep the canonical full parse.
Real environment tested: Local targeted Vitest wrapper plus AWS Crabbox changed gate.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.messages.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.subscribe-embedded-agent-session.emits-block-replies-text-end-does-not.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.subscribe-embedded-agent-session.suppresses-commentary-phase-output.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.subscribe-embedded-agent-session.subscribeembeddedagentsession.test.ts --reporter=dot`; `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`; AWS Crabbox changed gate above.
Evidence after fix: Focused subscriber regression tests pass after the final rebase; AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed` passed on the amended patch before the final clean rebase with no conflict or surface change.
Observed result after fix: Ordinary plain deltas reuse the incremental visible delta instead of replaying the full accumulated stream, while incomplete directive tails and previously stripped directives stay suppressed.
What was not tested: Live Ollama/API runtime was not rerun for this focused subscriber hot-path PR.
target.author: vincentkoc
